title: Sanji Answers as Mr. Prince
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on sanji answers as mr. prince, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Sanji Answers as Mr. Prince. Sanji’s hidden role as Mr. Prince disrupts Crocodile’s plan and creates the opening the crew needs to escape. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The Royal Guards get to fire to the town! We've gotta put it out!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm looking forward to it already...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Gahahaha! Uncertainty! Oh, how I love that word! "Uncertainty!"

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Just like myself, whose gender is uncertain!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Or an octofait, where it's uncertain how soft the octopus is!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Or the King of this country, whose sanity remains uncertain! Now that's what I call uncertainty!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: At the western edge of the town, Mr. 2 Bon Kurei!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The king transformed into a weird crossdresser...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: that King... was an impos- top!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Did you find out about some- thing you're not supposed to know...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That stupid queer slipped up big-time...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Guess there's no point in asking you to keep your mouth shut, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, wait! That's my store's goods you're using! Are you gonna pay for that or what!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You dumbass! This isn't the time for that! The town's burning!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Damn it, it's no good! The fire's spreading too fast!

summary: This part develops sanji answers as mr. prince and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
